{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322113530B7005B8892633F660E13"}"},"total":930},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617127461385732889","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"属性：男频
视角：男主
情感关系：可能是无cp（因为我没看完不知道）
类型：想了半天还是评价为奇幻（非西幻）+科幻元素吧
评价：是非常新颖与独特的文，开局以为是末世文，然后又以为是西幻，后来又觉得带点科幻，元素虽然多但是融合的很好，没有什么违和感，反而把世界观架构得很有特色，不是普遍大众的无脑爽文，能感觉到通过作者的文笔一点点铺开世界观的感觉，是比较慢热型的，需要仔细阅读的那种，虽然只看了一点点，但个人感觉还是算挺不错的了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773502397,"group_id":"7545057934175112217","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0kYBDJEZeyJKHvnlrg2ASyMrE9lAOV99JjLW+WQFK0X","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/47315e4cd5124f9eae1980001892b4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702736&x-signature=Lv7cLx8ukzU6UpUa2dRdQ0gKVDI%3D","user_id":"1931162309375646","user_name":"太宰与陀思是主人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1931162309375646","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545057934175112217","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾，异能，拯救，正义感男主，无丧尸，无系统，非后宫，非传统末世，部分长章节】
——130W字正常完结，浓缩是精华，不浪费大家时间！
如果天灾频繁了千百倍，世界会怎么样？
许兴遭遇了淹没一切的大洪水，发现自己穿越到一个时时会爆发灾难的世界。
金属羽翼，乘坐UFO的天使；
青铜面具，骑着翼龙的魔鬼；
大陆沉没，以船为家的海上漂流民；
身体畸变，供奉魔兽的原始部落……
人类在灾难中挣扎，毁灭整片大陆的灾难接二连三出现……
起初，许兴也是其中挣扎的一员， 
直到他发现——
自己是能够预知灾难的先知，还拥有操控光明的能力。
在这末世，他可以救无数人。
——本书底色是真善美，喜欢一切为己，血流成河的读者谨慎观看！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c08f742cb72d7e9fbce2673fdeba6e8b","author":"跳动的小火花","author_id":"","book_id":"7545057934175112217","book_name":"温暖流末世：我能预知天灾","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7545058048784466457","read_count":"10595","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1323457"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"373","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,求生,天灾,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/50357c53399ae56204632d494ecf4818~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779334530&x-signature=BXpPYlsisKFp0Y2tkkG75doucbM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"98513085683","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322113530B7005B8892633F660E13"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6174,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":309},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7554973729624769305","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了十几章，觉得可以先来推荐一下。
目前为止，世界架构还算可以，不算宏大，但逻辑严密自洽，经得起推敲，没有发现明显的bug。
主角和几个主要配角的人设也比较稳定，剧情还算有意思，值得一看。
其实很多小说，看个十几章就知道有没有看下去的必要了。那些世界观迷惑、逻辑混乱、人设恶心的，多半是看不下去的。
作者加油哦，这本书如果能保持目前的水准，至少是本粮草，至于能不能成为仙珍，得看后面世界观完全展现之后的剧情。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759032617,"group_id":"7545057934175112217","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"对光明抱有希冀，对黑暗保持警惕。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9cvusa2GkKgpnE4stlHzbA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/fb3616a750f4411fbcbf6ce80d357428~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710243&x-signature=BHgvvLPfjXGjPwJkiXKgB8xMASE%3D","user_id":"109091952807","user_name":"永恒的追逐者"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"109091952807","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7545057934175112217","book_info":{"abstract":"【天灾，异能，拯救，正义感男主，无丧尸，无系统，非后宫，非传统末世，部分长章节】
